signals.raw:
VP JD Vance** recently rallied with Turning Point USA in Georgia (low turnout, criticism of Trump feuds) and returned from unsuccessful Pakistan talks on Iran war; **White House** reaffirmed confidence in Vance and Sec. Rubio amid policy tensions—no new resolutions.[2][3][4]

signals.raw:
March 2026 CPI shows 3.3% annual inflation, up 0.9% monthly due to US-Israel war gas prices over $4/gallon | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

US CPI data released April 10, 2026, reported **headline annual inflation at 3.3%** (slightly below 3.4% economist estimates) and a **0.9% monthly rise**, the largest since 2022, driven by energy costs from the US-Israel conflict. Core CPI (excluding food/energy

signals.headline: Solana** markets price above $80 at 87-100% probability (Polymarket, Robinhood), with prices consolidating near $83-86 a
signals.raw:
Solana** markets price above $80 at 87-100% probability (Polymarket, Robinhood), with prices consolidating near $83-86 and short-term bullish technicals (support at $80-81), yet no fresh confirmations like exploits or pumps resolved today.[2][4][7]  
Video analysis notes SOL up 4% to ~$86 as of April 14 with strong volume, but flags risks of fakeouts—dated yesterday, not breaking now.[3]
